title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Google DeepMind developed Co-Scientist, a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system that generates, debates, and refines novel scientific hypotheses. The system iteratively processes complex scientific problems to accelerate scientific discovery by helping researchers formulate testable breakthrough ideas.
